mechanism_narrative: Declining federal funds rates reduce corporate borrowing costs and compress equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and weakening consumer spending power, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in >60% of triggered instances despite the unemployment spike.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in real personal consumption expenditures and housing starts indicates synchronized consumer and capital demand growth, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Joint positive growth in RSAFS and HOUST fails to predict positive 60-day returns with a statistically significant coefficient in multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: A contraction in the index of industrial production reflects immediate supply-side bottlenecks and reduced corporate output, triggering negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns remain positive in >65% of months where INDPRO declines, regardless of macro regime.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer price inflation erodes real corporate margins and forces anticipatory monetary tightening, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Positive 20-day returns occur in >60% of months following CPI acceleration above the threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Steady growth in total nonfarm payrolls expands aggregate income and supports sustained corporate earnings growth, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Quarterly forward returns are negative in >55% of periods following payroll growth, or Rank IC < 0.03 over rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between real GDP growth and real personal consumption expenditures indicates weakening household demand relative to overall economic output, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The divergence metric fails to predict negative returns with statistical significance in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production surpassing the 2017 baseline indicates robust manufacturing capacity utilization and strong corporate revenue generation, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are negative in >60% of months where the index exceeds the threshold.
